name: Neuro-Symbolic ODE Discovery with Latent Grammar Flow

description: arXiv:2604.16232v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Understanding natural and engineered systems often relies on symbolic formulations, such as differential equations, which provide interpretability and transferability beyond black-box models. We introduce Latent Grammar Flow (LGF), a neuro-symbolic generative framework for discovering ordinary differential equations from data. LGF embeds...
author: Karin Yu, Eleni Chatzi, Georgios Kissas
